prompt: Visualize the depth map of the squirrel using a vibrant color gradient, assigning bright red to the nearest parts and deep blue to the farthest parts.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Colorize the grayscale depth map of the squirrel using a vibrant gradient: map the nearest parts (lightest gray areas) to bright red and the farthest parts (darkest gray areas) to deep blue. Ensure a smooth color transition based on the depth values.
objects: bright red color on nearest parts of the squirrel
deep blue color on farthest parts of the squirrel
smooth color gradient on the squirrel
